title: cuminum sudanense
intro: Cuminum sudanense, also known as Sudanese cumin or black cumin, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and aiding in weight management. In herbal preparations, Cuminum sudanense seeds are often used to make tea, oil, or powder, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
